<var>
$DPS$ = (Damage * Burst Count) / (Cooldown + (Firerate * Burst Count)) + (Poison Damage / Tick)
$DPS2$ = Damage / Firerate + Poison Damage / Tick
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 525; 200; 800; 3500; 14000
$FNC-DETECTION$ = ; 0; 3
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Faster Reloading; Poisonous Bullets; Sinister Gear; Going Nuclear!
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = File:ToxicGunnerLevel1Icon.png; File:ToxicGunnerLevel2Icon.png; File:ToxicGunnerLevel3Icon.png; File:ToxicGunnerLevel4Icon.png
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
$CREF$ = <ref>Firerate only applies to the burst and is not the time between bursts.</ref>
$TREF$ = <ref>Total Elapsed Damage is calculated as Poison Damage × (Poison Time ÷ Tick)</ref>
$DREF$ = <ref>DPS is calculated as (Damage × Burst Count) ÷ (Cooldown + (Firerate × Burst Count)) + (Poison Damage ÷ Tick).<br/>When the '''Toxic Gunner''' stops firing in bursts, it is calculated as Damage ÷ Firerate + Poison Damage ÷ Tick<br/>DPS assumes all shots poison the same enemy.</ref>
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Poison Damage !! Burst Count !! Firerate$CREF$ !! Tick !! Cooldown !! Range !! Poison Time !! Defense Dropping !! Max Defense Dropping !! Total Elapsed Damage$TREF$ !! Slowdown !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 1 || 4 || 0.1 || 1 || 1.2 || 10 || 6 || N/A || N/A || 6 || 10% || $DPS$<ref>2.45 Gun DPS + 1 Poison DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 1 || 4 || 0.1 || 1 || 0.6 || 10 || 6 || N/A || N/A || 6 || 10% || $DPS$<ref>3.88 Gun DPS + 1 Poison DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 3 || 8 || 0.1 || 1 || 0.6 || 14 || 6 || N/A || N/A || 18 || 20% || $DPS$<ref>5.46 Gun DPS + 3 Poison DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 4 || 4 || 20 || 0.1 || 1 || 0.6 || 14 || 6 || 3% || 50% || 24 || 20% || $DPS$<ref>28.99 Gun DPS + 4 Poison DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 11 || 10 || N/A || 0.135 || 1 || 0 || 18 || 10 || 3% || 50% || 100 || 30% || $DPS2$<ref>76.92 Gun DPS + 10 Poison DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
​
